stories.title: Ollama Dockerfile with baked model
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN ollama/Dockerfile exists, WHEN docker build -t kanban-ollama ./ollama runs, THEN the build completes without error and the image contains llama3.2:3b model weights
GIVEN the built image is started, WHEN ollama list runs, THEN the output includes llama3.2:3b
GIVEN the Dockerfile, WHEN inspected, THEN it uses the official ollama/ollama base image and references no cloud credentials

stories.title: Ollama service added to docker-compose.yml
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN docker-compose.yml is parsed, WHEN services key is inspected, THEN a service named ollama exists with build.context: ./ollama
GIVEN the ollama service definition, WHEN healthcheck.test is read, THEN it references port 11434 and confirms the model is available
GIVEN the agent service depends_on block, WHEN inspected, THEN it includes ollama with condition: service_healthy

stories.title: Remove GROQ_API_KEY from docker-compose.yml
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN docker-compose.yml is parsed, WHEN all service environment blocks are scanned, THEN no key named GROQ_API_KEY is present
GIVEN the agent service environment block, WHEN inspected, THEN it contains OLLAMA_BASE_URL: http://ollama:11434 and nothing referencing Groq

stories.title: Remove GROQ_API_KEY from .env and .env.example
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN .env is read, WHEN contents are scanned, THEN GROQ_API_KEY does not appear
GIVEN .env.example is read, WHEN contents are scanned, THEN GROQ_API_KEY does not appear and no Groq comment exists
GIVEN .env after the change, WHEN docker compose config runs, THEN no warnings about undefined variables previously satisfied by GROQ_API_KEY

stories.title: Rewrite agent/main.py to use Ollama
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN main.py is read, WHEN source is scanned for the string groq (case-insensitive), THEN no occurrence is found
GIVEN main.py is imported in a test with OLLAMA_BASE_URL unset, WHEN the module loads, THEN it does not raise RuntimeError
GIVEN _run_tool_loop is called with a mocked _ollama_client.chat.completions.create, WHEN mock returns a non-tool-call completion, THEN the function returns the content string

stories.title: Update agent unit tests to remove Groq mock references
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN all test files in agent/ are scanned for _groq_client, WHEN scan completes, THEN zero matches are found
GIVEN pytest agent/test_chat.py runs with OLLAMA_BASE_URL unset, WHEN run completes, THEN all tests pass
GIVEN pytest agent/ runs, WHEN complete, THEN all previously passing tests continue to pass with no GROQ_API_KEY requirement

stories.title: Update test_compose.py for new Ollama topology
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN test_compose.py runs after OLM-002 and OLM-003 are applied, WHEN pytest agent/test_compose.py -v executes, THEN all tests pass
GIVEN the test file, WHEN read, THEN it asserts ollama is present in compose services and GROQ_API_KEY is absent from every service environment
GIVEN the test file, WHEN read, THEN the old TC-005 GROQ_API_KEY bare-env-reference test is replaced or removed
